---
title: "Functions"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

```

```{r data import}
template <- read_excel("./Manuscript/Sample sheet layout.xlsx")
```


```{r column name recoder}

colname_recode <- function(df, verbose = T) {
  # ---- Check dependency ----
  if (!requireNamespace("janitor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'janitor' is required. Install with install.packages('janitor')")
  }
  
  # ---- Step 1: clean names ----
  df <- janitor::clean_names(df)
  current <- names(df)
  
  # ---- Load clean dictionary ----
  dict <- list(
    Samp_ID = c("samp_id", "sample id"),
    Trip_ID = c("trip id", "trip_id", "s_trip_id", "id", "sample"),
    Trip = c("trip"),
    Project = c("bioproject", "project", "bio_project"),
    Source_Type = c("type", "source_type"),
    Date = c("date", "date_x", "col date", "collection date"),
    Time = c("time", "capture_time", "S_END_DATE_TIME", "end_datetime"),
    Site = c("site", "river mile", "river_mile_x", "rm", "start_rm", "s_river_mile"),
    Tributary = c("tributary"),
    RM = c(),
    Species = c("species", "fish", "species_code"),
    TL_mm = c(
      "total length",
      "total length (mm)",
      "total_length",
      "total_length_mm",
      "tl_mm"
    ),
    FL_mm = c(
      "fork length",
      "fork length (mm)",
      "forklen",
      "fork_length",
      "fork_length_mm",
      "fl_mm"
    ),
    Weight_g = c("weight", "weight (g)", "weight_g"),
    Sex = c("sex", "sex_code"),
    Pit.Tag = c("pit", "pit tag", "pit_tag", "pittag", "fish_tag"),
    Fecal = c(
      "fecal",
      "poop",
      "fecal y/n",
      "fecalsample(y/n)",
      "gut_dna",
      "gut dna",
      "gut?"
    ),
    Skin = c("skin"),
    Eyes = c("eyes"),
    Dorsal = c("dorsal"),
    Caudal = c("caudal"),
    Pectoral = c("pectoral"),
    Operculum = c("operculum"),
    Gills = c("gills"),
    Iso = c("iso", "isotope", "fin", "finclip1", "fin_clip"),
    Bait = c("bait"),
    Crew = c("crew", "s_crew"),
    Notes = c("notes", "notes.x", "notes.y", "specimen_notes"),
    Other_seq_info = c(
      "run",
      "librarylayout",
      "extracted",
      "sequenced",
      "inhibitor removal",
      "other_seq_info"
    ),
    `18s_Fastq_ID` = c("x18s_fastq_id", "fastq_18s", "18s_id"),
    `18s_run`      = c("run_18s", "18s_run"),
    `16s_Fastq_ID` = c("x16s_fastq_id", "fastq_16s", "16s_id"),
    `16s_run`      = c("run_16s", "x16s_run"),
    Other_Fastq_ID = c("other_fastq_id")
  )
  dict_clean <- lapply(dict, janitor::make_clean_names)
  
  # ---- Initialize ----
  new_names <- rep(NA_character_, length(current))
  
  # ---- Matching (dictionary only) ----
  for (i in seq_along(current)) {
    cn <- current[i]
    
    for (std in names(dict_clean)) {
      if (cn %in% dict_clean[[std]]) {
        new_names[i] <- std
        break
      }
    }
  }
  
  # ---- Identify unmatched ----
  unmatched <- current[is.na(new_names)]
  
  if (length(unmatched) > 0) {
    message("Unmatched columns: ", paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  # ---- Apply names (keep original if unmatched) ----
  final_names <- ifelse(is.na(new_names), current, new_names)
  
  # ----Useful output ----
  cat("\n--- Column Mapping ---\n")
  mapping_df <- data.frame(
    original_clean = current,
    standardized = final_names,
    matched = !is.na(new_names)
  )
  print(mapping_df, row.names = FALSE)
  
  unmatched <- current[is.na(new_names)]
  
  if (length(unmatched) > 0) {
    cat("\n--- Unmatched Columns ---\n")
    cat(paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nAll columns matched successfully.\n")
  }
  
  #return clean data frame
  names(df) <- final_names
  return(df)
}



fixed_test <- colname_recode(test)

KB2023test <- colname_recode(X2023_April_KB)
rev2025test <- colname_recode(X2025_revena_complete)
  
```
  
  
```{r column formatting}
coerce_with_validation <- function(df, schema) {
  
  schema <- list(
    Samp_ID = "character",
    `18s_Fastq_ID` = "character",
    `18s_run` = "factor",
    `16s_Fastq_ID` = "character",
    `16s_run` = "factor",
    Other_Fastq_ID = "character",
    Other_seq_info = "character",
    Project = "factor",
    Source_Type = "factor",
    Trip_ID = "character",
    Trip = "factor",
    Date = "Date",
    Site = "factor",
    Tributary = "logical",   # Y/N
    RM = "numeric",
    Time = "factor",
    Species = "factor",
    TL_mm = "numeric",
    FL_mm = "numeric",
    Weight_g = "numeric",
    `Pit.Tag` = "character",
    Bait = "character",
    Iso = "logical",
    Fecal = "logical",
    Skin = "factor",
    Eyes = "factor",
    Dorsal = "factor",
    Caudal = "factor",
    Pectoral = "factor",
    Operculum = "factor",
    Gills = "factor",
    Sex = "factor",
    Crew = "character",
    Notes = "character"
  )
  
  #sort columns based on schema
  all_cols <- names(df)
  matching_cols <- intersect(names(df), names(schema))
  non_matching_cols <- setdiff(all_cols, names(schema))
  
  if (length(matching_cols) == 0) {
    stop("No colnames match standard format")
  }
  
  # Track results
report <- data.frame(
  column = character(),
  original_type = character(),
  target_type = character(),
  converted = logical(),
  in_schema = logical(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

  
  error_list <- list()
  
  # Helper conversion function
  convert_col <- function(x, type) {
    if (type == "character") return(as.character(x))
    if (type == "numeric") return(as.numeric(x))
    if (type == "integer") return(as.integer(x))
    if (type == "factor") return(as.factor(x))
    if (type == "Date") return(as.Date(x))
    
    if (type == "logical") {
      # Handle Y/N, TRUE/FALSE
      return(ifelse(
        toupper(x) %in% c("Y", "YES", "TRUE"), TRUE,
        ifelse(toupper(x) %in% c("N", "NO", "FALSE"), FALSE, NA)
      ))
    }
    
    stop(paste("Unsupported type:", type))
  }
  
  for (col in matching_cols) {
    original <- df[[col]]
    
    #fix NAs
    original <- if (is.character(original)) {
      trimmed <- trimws(original)
      trimmed[trimmed %in% c("NA", "N/A", "", "NULL")] <- NA
      trimmed
    } else {
      original
    }
    original_type <- class(original)[1]
    target_type <- schema[[col]]
    
    # Track NA before conversion
    na_before <- is.na(original)
    
    converted <- FALSE
    new_col <- original
    
    # Attempt conversion
    suppressWarnings({
      new_col <- tryCatch(
        convert_col(original, target_type),
        error = function(e) e
      )
    })
    
    if (inherits(new_col, "error")) {
      error_list[[col]] <- "Conversion failed entirely"
      next
    }
    
    converted <- !identical(class(original)[1], class(new_col)[1])
    
    # Detect NEW NAs
    na_after <- is.na(new_col)
    new_na_positions <- which(!na_before & na_after)
    
    if (length(new_na_positions) > 0) {
      bad_values <- unique(original[new_na_positions])
      error_list[[col]] <- head(bad_values, 5)
    }
    
    df[[col]] <- new_col
    
    report <- rbind(report, data.frame(
      column = col,
      in_schema = TRUE,
      original_type = original_type,
      target_type = target_type,
      converted = converted,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  
if (length(non_matching_cols) > 0) {
  extra_rows <- data.frame(
    column = non_matching_cols,
    in_schema = FALSE,
    original_type = sapply(df[non_matching_cols], function(x) class(x)[1]),
    target_type = NA,
    converted = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  report <- rbind(report, extra_rows)
}

  
  # If any errors → return error report only
  if (length(error_list) > 0) {
    return(list(
      status = "error",
      problems = error_list
    ))
  }
  
  # Otherwise return success report

message("All columns successfully matched to target types.")

print(report)   # optional but useful

return(df)

}
```
  
```{r test}

```
